metadata.title: Ultra Modern Villa in Palm Jumeirah | Luxury Estate
metadata.description: Luxury villa in Palm Jumeirah, Dubai — 6 bedrooms, 7 bathrooms, private pool and stunning Dubai skyline views.

propertyDetail.title: Ultra Modern Villa in Palm Jumeirah
propertyDetail.location: Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

description.title: Description
description.p1: We present an exceptional architectural masterpiece in the heart of Palm Jumeirah. This villa features a contemporary design that blends luxury with privacy, offering breathtaking views of the Dubai skyline and the Arabian Gulf. The finest global materials were used in the finishes, from premium Italian marble to smart lighting systems.
description.p2: The villa includes spacious living areas, a fully equipped kitchen with the latest appliances, and a master suite spanning an entire floor. A private garden and infinity pool area provide a world-class resort experience in your own home.

agent.name: Ahmed Mansour
agent.title: Certified Agent - Elite Category
agent.verifiedDesc: All data for this property has been verified by Luxury Estate
